in-uk.legend: Are you currently in the UK?

booked-travel.legend: Have you booked your travel to the UK?

yes.label: Yes, I have booked my travel

no.label: No, I have not booked my travel

booked-travel-date-to-uk.legend: What date are you leaving to travel the UK?

travel-doc-number.label: Document number
travel-doc-number.hint: Passport or Home Office Travel Document number. This can contain letters and numbers. For example, 120383978A

travel-doc-nationality.label: Country of nationality
travel-doc-nationality.hint: This is the country of nationality shown on your travel document. Use the English spelling or the country code

premium.legend: Did you pay for a priority or super priority service?

premium-priority.label: I paid for a priority service

premium-super-priority.label: I paid for a super priority service

premium-none.label: No, I did not pay for a priority or super priority service

yes.label: Yes, I can see an eVisa in my UKVI account
yes.hint: You should still choose this if some details are incorrect

no.label: No, I cannot access my eVisa or UKVI account
no.hint: This could be because you cannot see an eVisa in your account, you do not have an account or you cannot sign in

trying-to-do.legend: What are you trying to do?

trying-to-prove-status.label: View your eVisa or prove your immigration status
trying-to-prove-status.hint: For example, check your permission or get a share code to send to a landlord or employer

trying-to-update-details.label: Update your UKVI account details
trying-to-update-details.hint: For example, your email address, phone number, photo or identity document

trying-to-report-error.label: Report an error with your eVisa
trying-to-report-error.hint: For example, there is a mistake with the details on your eVisa or something has gone wrong

problem.legend: What is the problem with your eVisa?
problem.hint: You can select more than one option

problem-future-partner-name.label: Future spouse or civil partner name

problem-accompanying-adult-details.label: Name or passport numbers of accompanying adult

problem-flight-number-airport.label: Must leave UK via (flight number and airport)

problem-restrictions-in-uk.label: What you can and cannot do in the UK

problem-signin-email.label: Email address to sign in to your account

problem-signin-phone.label: Phone number to sign in to your account

problem-immigration-status.label: What problem are you having with your immigration status?
problem-immigration-status.hint: This could be because your status is old, incorrect or you cannot view it

correct-visa-start-date.legend: What is the correct date your visa is valid from?
correct-visa-start-date.hint: Enter date in the format DD MM YYYY

correct-visa-end-date.legend: What is the correct date your visa is valid to?
correct-visa-end-date.hint: Enter date in the format DD MM YYYY

correct-national-insurance-number.label: National Insurance number
correct-national-insurance-number.hint: It's on your National Insurance card, benefit letter, payslip or P60 - for example, 'QQ 12 34 56 C'

photo.label: Describe the problem you are having with your photo

how-many-adults.legend: How many adults have been approved to accompany a child?

detail-restrictions-in-uk.label: What is wrong with the details of what you can and cannot do in the UK?

detail-share-code.label: Which share code are you unable to create?
detail-share-code.hint: This could be for right to work, right to rent or something else

correct-signin-email.label: What is the correct email address to sign in to your account?
correct-signin-email.hint: You will also get security codes sent to this email address

detail-signin-phone.label: What is the correct phone number where you can receive security codes?

problem-not-listed.label: Describe the problem you are having

is-refugee.legend: Do you have permission to stay in the UK as a refugee?

asylum-support.hint: This is housing or money to support you if you are waiting to find out if you will be given asylum.

no-reference.label: I do not have a reference number

requestor-contact-method.legend: We will contact you to confirm when we have corrected your details, or to let you know if we need more information.

completing-for-someone-else.legend: Are you completing this form on behalf of someone else?
completing-for-someone-else.hint: For example, you are a friend, relative, employer, charity worker or lawyer.
